display_text: Lina Aghanim's Scepter: Flame Cloak grants unobstructed movement, increased spell damage, magic resistance, and max Fiery Soul stacks. This upgrade counters movement impairment and magic burst, transforming Lina into a highly mobile, spell-resistant damage dealer during engagements.
search_text: Lina Aghanim Scepter Flame Cloak unobstructed movement anti-magic spell damage Fiery Soul stacks

display_text: Lina Aghanim's Shard: Converts Laguna Blade damage into a barrier, countering burst damage and sustain threats. This enables Lina to survive retaliation after using her ultimate, reinforcing her role as a high-risk, high-reward nuker in teamfights.
search_text: Lina Aghanim Shard Laguna Blade barrier anti-burst sustain survivability
